title: hieracium cordatum subsp. gersicum
intro: Hieracium cordatum subsp. gersicum is a subspecies of the Hieracium cordatum plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is a perennial herb used in herbal medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of improving digestion, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Hieracium cordatum subsp. gersicum can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
